title: Sample Block-Based Service Page
description: Example page built with the block builder — demonstrates composable sections for health screening services.

blocks.headline: Male Health Screening
blocks.subtitle: A comprehensive, evidence-based health assessment designed specifically for men at every stage of life.

blocks.heading: Prevention Over Reaction
blocks.bodyText: At Cocoon, we believe the best healthcare is proactive. Our male health screening goes beyond routine checks — we build a longitudinal picture of your health that deepens with every visit, catching subtle changes early and guiding smarter decisions over time.

blocks.headline: What's Included
blocks.description: Every screening is tailored to your age, lifestyle, and family history.

features.title: Cardiovascular Assessment
features.description: Blood pressure, cholesterol panel, and cardiac risk scoring to understand your heart health.

features.title: Metabolic Panel
features.description: Glucose, HbA1c, liver and kidney function markers for a complete metabolic snapshot.

features.title: Hormonal Health
features.description: Testosterone, thyroid, and key hormone levels assessed in clinical context.

features.title: Cancer Markers
features.description: PSA and other age-appropriate cancer screening markers with consultant review.

features.title: Body Composition
features.description: Beyond BMI — detailed analysis of muscle mass, visceral fat, and metabolic age.

features.title: Mental Wellbeing
features.description: Validated screening tools for stress, sleep quality, and psychological resilience.

blocks.heading: Designed Around You
blocks.bodyText: Your screening takes place in a calm, private setting with a dedicated consultant who takes the time to listen. No rushed appointments, no impersonal conveyor belts — just thoughtful, personalised healthcare.

blocks.heading: Measurable Impact
blocks.description: Our longitudinal care model delivers results that compound over time.

steps.title: Book Your Screening
steps.description: Choose a time that suits you. We'll send a pre-screening questionnaire to personalise your assessment.

steps.title: Your Appointment
steps.description: Spend 60–90 minutes with your consultant for a thorough, unhurried health assessment.

steps.title: Results & Insights
steps.description: Receive a detailed report within 5 working days, with a follow-up consultation to discuss findings.

steps.title: Ongoing Care
steps.description: Your results feed into your longitudinal health record, building a richer picture with every visit.

blocks.quote: For the first time, I feel like someone is actually paying attention to my health rather than just ticking boxes. The depth of insight from my screening was genuinely eye-opening.

items.question: How long does a screening take?
items.answer: Your appointment lasts 60–90 minutes. We never rush — your consultant will take as long as needed to complete a thorough assessment.

items.question: Do I need to fast before my screening?
items.answer: Yes, we recommend fasting for 10–12 hours before your appointment for the most accurate blood results. Water and black coffee are fine.

items.question: How often should I be screened?
items.answer: We recommend annual screenings for most men. If we identify risk factors, we may suggest more frequent monitoring of specific markers.

items.question: Will my GP receive a copy of results?
items.answer: Only with your explicit consent. We can share a summary report with your GP if you'd like them involved in your ongoing care.

blocks.heading: Take the First Step
blocks.bodyText: Book your comprehensive male health screening today and invest in the health intelligence that lasts a lifetime.
